name: dat-ai-testcase-copilot-bridge-v4
description: DAT AI Test Case Generator v4.0 (Copilot Bridge edition): uses the DAT Copilot Bridge VS Code extension (GitHub Copilot) instead of the OpenAI API, adds selectable Test Case Type (Integration/Unit/Comprehensive), duplicate removal, editable preview with Save/Cancel, plus the existing Document Classifier, Knowledge Base Cache, Coverage Engine, and Browser Close Cleanup.
